result.stdout:
LocalisationAnalyser.Tools
  osu! Localisation Tools

Usage:
  LocalisationAnalyser.Tools [options] [command]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  to-resx <project-file>                       Generates resource (.resx) files from all localisations in the target project.
  from-php <osu-web directory> <project-file>  Converts localisations from the target osu!web directory into the target project.

commands.payload:
LocalisationAnalyser.Tools
  osu! Localisation Tools

Usage:
  LocalisationAnalyser.Tools [options] [command]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  to-resx <project-file>                       Generates resource (.resx) files from all localisations in the target project.
  from-php <osu-web directory> <project-file>  Converts localisations from the target osu!web directory into the target project.

result.stdout:
from-php
  Converts localisations from the target osu!web directory into the target project.

Usage:
  LocalisationAnalyser.Tools [options] from-php <osu-web directory> <project-file>

Arguments:
  <osu-web directory>  The osu!web installation directory.
  <project-file>       The target C# project (.csproj) file to place the localisations in.

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
from-php
  Converts localisations from the target osu!web directory into the target project.

Usage:
  LocalisationAnalyser.Tools [options] from-php <osu-web directory> <project-file>

Arguments:
  <osu-web directory>  The osu!web installation directory.
  <project-file>       The target C# project (.csproj) file to place the localisations in.

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
to-resx
  Generates resource (.resx) files from all localisations in the target project.

Usage:
  LocalisationAnalyser.Tools [options] to-resx <project-file>

Arguments:
  <project-file>  The C# project (.csproj) file.

Options:
  --output <output>  The path to output the resource files into.
                     By default, the .resx files are output alongside their .cs counterparts.
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
